prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock GW4N20 (2.0L turbocharged inline-4, 252 HP) with a fully built internals package featuring forged Mahle pistons (87.5mm bore, 9.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Pair with a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (76mm compressor, 0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe by Armytrix for reduced backpressure.

Fuel System: Upgrade to a dual-pump setup with two Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, paired with ID1700x injectors and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator. Integrate a Link G4X ECU with a custom flex-fuel sensor to support E85 blends, tuned by a specialist using dyno-proven maps for 550+ WHP.

Suspension: Install a full Öhlins TTX46 coilover kit with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression) and remote reservoirs. Replace the stock sway bars with adjustable Whiteline front (24mm) and rear (22mm) anti-roll bars, and reinforce the subframes with custom polyurethane bushings from SuperPro for improved chassis rigidity.
estetica: Aero: Fit a Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (TANK 700-specific) with carbon fiber fenders, side skirts, and a rear diffuser. Add a custom front splitter by Varis with integrated canards and a GT-style rear wing (adjustable angle) from Seibon Carbon for aggressive downforce.

Wheels: Mount a set of Rotiform LAS-R 22x12.5 (+35 offset) forged wheels in a satin black finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (305/35R22). Pair with Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (405mm rotors) and stainless steel braided lines for enhanced braking performance.

Interior: Replace the stock seats with Recaro Pole Position bucket seats (carbon fiber shell) and a custom 6-point roll cage by Custom Cages UK. Install a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard with a digital gauge cluster (AEM CD-7) and a quick-release NRG steering wheel paired with a hydraulic e-brake handle.
